title: hieracium subcaesium subsp. livescens
intro: Hieracium subcaesium subsp. livescens is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe, belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium subcaesium subsp. livescens can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
